title: I Trust My Skill and Wisdom to Build Property
subtitle: An affirmation for anchoring confidence in your ability to create wealth through property and investment
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 72 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names three things already in place: skill, intuition, wisdom. Property investment stops being aspirational and starts being the next thing.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 72 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 72 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 72 centres on trusting the ability to build legacy properties and assets. The affirmation names three things already in place: skill, intuition, wisdom. Property investment stops being aspirational and starts being the next concrete thing.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Notice whether it lands as recognition or as a stretch.
I trust my skill, intuition, and wisdom to create wealth through property and investment.
Adapted from the Day 72 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
